skill.name: maxhub-temp-mail
skill.description: Temporary email creation and management skill for receiving verification codes and emails. Activates when users mention temp mail, temporary email, verification codes, or privacy-related needs.
skill.summary: Create temporary email addresses and receive emails/verification codes through MaxHub API.
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: Low-risk skill that provides temporary email functionality through MaxHub API. Static analysis detected 56 potential issues, but evaluation confirmed all findings are legitimate documentation patterns (curl command examples in code blocks, env variable references in docs). No malicious code execution, no credential exfiltration, no system manipulation. The skill explicitly declares security boundaries and only accesses configured MaxHub API endpoints over HTTPS.

medium_findings.title: Documentation Shell Commands
medium_findings.description: Curl command examples in documentation code blocks triggered external_commands heuristic. These are safe API documentation examples showing how to call MaxHub API endpoints. No actual code execution occurs.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: All 29 instances are from markdown code blocks showing curl command examples - standard API documentation practice

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable References
medium_findings.description: Documentation references environment variable names (MAXHUB_API_KEY, MAXHUB_BASE_URL). These are legitimate configuration documentation, not actual credential access.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: References are in documentation context, not actual environment variable access in code

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API URLs
low_findings.description: URLs pointing to MaxHub service (aconfig.cn) are legitimate and expected for this API wrapper skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs are the legitimate MaxHub API endpoints documented in the skill specification

content.user_title: Create temporary email addresses for verification
content.value_statement: Need disposable email addresses for website signups or verification codes? This skill creates temporary email addresses and retrieves incoming messages automatically.
actual_capabilities: Create new temporary email addresses instantly
Retrieve all emails in temporary inbox by token
Fetch specific email by message ID
Extract verification codes from email content
Chain multiple API calls for complex workflows
limitations: Email addresses expire after a short period (varies by provider)
Requires valid MaxHub API key for authentication
Cannot receive attachments or view email headers

use_cases.title: Website signup verification
use_cases.description: Generate a temp email to sign up for services without exposing your real email address. Receive and extract verification codes automatically.

use_cases.title: Testing email workflows
use_cases.description: Use temporary emails to test user registration flows, password reset emails, and notification systems in development environments.

use_cases.title: One-time communications
use_cases.description: Create disposable email addresses for newsletters, promotional offers, or any situation where you want to avoid spam to your primary inbox.

prompt_templates.title: Create new temp email
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a new temporary email address for me.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user needs a fresh disposable email

prompt_templates.title: Get verification code
prompt_templates.prompt: Check my temp email and extract the verification code from the latest message.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user is waiting for a verification email

prompt_templates.title: Read specific email
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the email content from message ID {message_id} in my temp inbox.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user has a specific email ID to retrieve

prompt_templates.title: Monitor inbox for specific sender
prompt_templates.prompt: Check my temp email inbox and tell me if there is any email from {sender_domain}.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to filter emails by sender

output_examples.input: Create a new temporary email address for me.
output_examples.output:
Created new temporary email: xk7s9@example.temp-mail.com
Token: abc123xyz789
Use this address to receive emails.

output_examples.input: Extract the verification code from my temp inbox.
output_examples.output:
Found 1 email in inbox.

From: noreply@service.com
Subject: Your Verification Code

Verification code: 58472

Code expires in 10 minutes.

best_practices: Check inbox immediately after creating email - temp addresses expire quickly
Store the email token securely when you need to access the inbox later
Use descriptive variable names like 'verification_token' instead of generic names
anti_patterns: Do not use temp emails for important accounts that require long-term access
Do not share temporary email addresses with others - they are not private
Do not rely on temp email for critical communications - data may be lost

faq.question: How long do temporary emails last?
faq.answer: Email expiration time varies by provider. Check the specific service documentation for details. Most temp emails expire within 10 minutes to 24 hours.

faq.question: Can I send emails from a temporary address?
faq.answer: No, this skill only supports receiving emails. Temporary email addresses are for receiving messages, not sending.

faq.question: Is my activity tracked when using temp emails?
faq.answer: The MaxHub API logs API usage for billing purposes. The temp email provider may also log message metadata. Avoid using temp emails for sensitive communications.

faq.question: What happens if my temp email expires before I receive a message?
faq.answer: Expired email addresses cannot receive new messages. You will need to create a new temporary email address and request the message to be resent if possible.

faq.question: Can attachments be retrieved through this skill?
faq.answer: No, the current version only retrieves email text content. Attachment handling is not supported in this version.

faq.question: How do I get an API key for MaxHub?
faq.answer: Visit https://www.aconfig.cn, register an account, and create an API key from the dashboard. Set the key as MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable.
